items.title: Power outages hit France as record heatwave set to peak
items.summary: About 68,000 homes in Brittany have been affected, with electricity unlikely to be fully restored until Wednesday night.

items.title: Air conditioning creates political divide after France records hottest day
items.summary: France is being forced to re-think its longstanding reservations about air-conditioning as temperatures soar.

items.title: UN nuclear chief says inspectors will visit Iran sites as part of war deal
items.summary: Rafael Grossi says the IAEA is "working on modalities" but an Iranian  minister says such access would only be part of a final deal with the US.

items.title: Markets digest bank earnings after recent turmoil

items.summary: So far this tax season, the IRS has received more than 90 million income tax returns for 2022.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 伊朗官媒首現未戴頭巾女性 戰後打「團結牌」化解政權危機
items.summary: 在與美國簽署初步停戰協議後，伊朗政府不僅在美國和以色列的聯手攻擊中存活下來，更在進行中的和平談判裡掌握優勢，但由於國家深陷經濟危機，加上戰前席捲全國的反政府抗議活動使民眾嚴重...…

items.title: 烏俄克里米亞熱戰！俄軍建「堤道式橋梁」強化補給線

items.title: 俄影子艦隊運油金援戰爭 瑞典籲歐盟積極登船攔截
items.summary: 瑞典電視台調查報導發現，僅是今年已有262艘俄國影子艦隊油輪，經由波羅的海運送石油；瑞典外長斯典尼嘉德呼籲歐盟各國積極登船檢查，以阻斷俄國規避制裁，透過出口石油繼續取得攻打烏克蘭的資源。 ...…
